calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Peter Liederman, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Capital One Bank.
No appearance by the Defendant: Gerald S. Bustos.
After hearing the testimony, reviewing of the declaration, and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $8,229.67
Prejudgment Interest $855.81
Costs $269.00, for a Total of $9,354.48.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Set For Trial On Mar-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. "CAUSING" TO BE MAILED DOES NOT SHOW PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE OF SERVICE. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Notice Of Motion To Postpone Judgments On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GERALD BUSTOS Notice Of Motion To Postpone Judgments On The Pleadings

No appearances on this matter. The Court took Defendant's Motion off calendar for insufficient notice. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
